UI_SC_MarkerInfo: The position of the marker on the screen. If the notice board is on the left wall set 'Left'. If on the right wall set 'Right'. If 'No marker' then no marker will appear.
UI_SC_LimitInfo: Limit on the maximum number of advertisements. If the value is 1, then only one ad allowed.
UI_SC_BoardName: The name of the board displayed at the top. Cannot be changed after creation.
UI_SC_StyleBoardInfo: Board style. You can create your own textures, see SC_Board_Styles.lua
UI_SC_RemoveInfo:
Are you sure you want to delete the message board?
This action is irreversible!
UI_SC_OnlyAdminsAd: Only the administrator can delete this entry
UI_SC_OnlyAdminsBoard: When enabled, only the administrator can post ads.
UI_SC_AdRemoved: [ Someone just ripped this ad off the board ]
